---
title: "[Masterclass] Managing Research Data"
author: 
- Nature Masterclasses
publication: "Nature Masterclasses"
categories: 
  - mentorship
  - careers
href: https://masterclasses.nature.com/managing-research-data/18320206
url_preprint: 
journ: "Nature Masterclasses"
issue: 
page: 
year: 
image: ""
pub_number: 
doi: 
---
